name: I'm an independent contractor hurt on a job site—do I still get workers comp?
description: You might. If the company controls your work details and hours, Utah law may classify you as an employee eligible for benefits despite your 1099 tax status.

acceptedAnswer.text: You might. If the company controls your work details and hours, Utah law may classify you as an employee eligible for benefits despite your 1099 tax status.
